description: Documentation update covering all changes made in this task. Update README, add/update setup docs, document Bulletin Board architecture, update Prisma workflow docs, and provide a QA checklist.
steps: Update README.md: add Bulletin Board to the architecture summary table, add it to the 'platform now supports' list, add a brief Bulletin Board section explaining the system (public-readable, admin-editable, editorial/community content). Remove any references to the old homepage editor system. Update the Current Product Priorities list to include Bulletin Board.
Update docs/SETUP.md (if it references homepage editor, remove those references). Add note about Bulletin Board being admin-editable via Discord role auth.

Create docs/BULLETIN_BOARD.md documenting: purpose (community/editorial layer), architecture (shared public/admin components, inline editing), post types (announcement, match_hype, player_spotlight, team_roast, weekly_recap), post lifecycle (draft->published->archived), admin authorization (Discord admin role), API routes (GET/POST /api/bulletin-board, GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/bulletin-board/[id]), template system, related entity linking, and the 'Latest from Bulletin Board' homepage integration.
Update docs/PRISMA_WORKFLOW.md if it exists to note the HomepageContent model removal and BulletinPost addition. If it doesn't exist, skip this step.
Run npm run lint to confirm no issues with any docs changes that affect code
acceptance_criteria: README.md no longer references homepage editor
verification: npm run lint exits with code 0
findings: All documentation updates applied cleanly. No references to homepage editor existed in README.md. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md still contains stale homepage editor references but was not in scope for this feature. Lint passes with only pre-existing console warning in lib/captainLog.js.
